'''Argaloh Adasca''' was the sixth [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] of the [[House of Adasca]]. His reign resulted in much wealth and advancement. He was the father of [[Alok Adasca|Alok]], the seventh Lord Adasca, and grandfather of [[Arkoh Adasca|Arkoh]], the eighth Lord Adasca.

==Biography==
Three years after the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]], Argaloh sent a group of scientists, led by [[Gorman Vandrayk]], on a mission to find out if they could control the huge [[Exogorth/Legends|exogorths]]. It was indeed a success, but Vandrayk realized that Argaloh was planning to use them for [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] dominance and escaped Adascorp for good. The dastardly ruler went on a search party for Vandrayk and would not rest until his dream was complete.

Argaloh eventually died and years later, Arkoh finished the search for Vandrayk to start the exogorth massacre.
